name: Butterscotch Pecan Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Butter a 13 x 9 inch pan and line the bottom and sides with foil.
3. Heat condensed milk and chips over low heat, stirring until the chips melt.
4. In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt.
5. Beat butter and sugar together until creamy.
6. Add egg and vanilla to the butter mixture and beat until light and fluffy.
7. Gradually add the flour mixture to the butter mixture until the dough just comes together.
8. Set aside half of the dough.
9. Press the remaining dough into the bottom and up the sides of the pan, creating a 1/2-inch thick layer.
10. Pour the butterscotch filling over the dough.
11. Crumble the reserved dough on top of the filling.
12. Sprinkle pecans evenly over the crumbled dough.
13. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
14. Remove from the pan using foil and let cool.
15. Cut into squares.
